untranslatable_reason: This signal is a position sizing rule (half-Kelly leverage multiplier = 0.5), not a price-based trading signal. It requires a portfolio-level leverage calculation based on estimated returns and volatility, which cannot be expressed as indicator conditions on individual price bars. The signal applies a constant 0.5 multiplier to Kelly-derived position sizes across all trades. This is a risk management overlay, not a tradeable entry/exit condition.
translation_notes: Signal ID CHAN_QT_DRY_0 defines a leverage constraint (half-Kelly vs full Kelly) rather than trade logic. Implementation requires: (1) calculation of portfolio expected return and volatility, (2) Kelly formula: f* = (mean_return / variance), (3) application of 0.5 multiplier to position size. This belongs in the portfolio constructor or position sizing module, not in the signal rules engine. No entry/exit conditions can be derived without additional parameters on return estimation methodology.
